vulnerability.reference: Clinicians rely on enhanced images without interrogating hallucination risk, mistaking artifacts for pathology.
vulnerability.generated: Radiologists depend on AI-enhanced images for diagnostic decisions without real-time means to distinguish hallucinated details from true pathology.

impact.reference: Misdiagnosis, unnecessary treatments, patient harm, and erosion of trust in medical AI.
impact.generated: Misdiagnosis and inappropriate medical interventions from false pathological findings, harming patients and eroding trust in AI-assisted imaging.

dose_response.reference: Conditionally-controlled generation hallucinates details in super-resolution; clinicians trust enhanced images, mistaking artifacts for pathology and causing misdiagnosis and patient harm.
dose_response.generated: Conditionally-controlled consistency generation yielding unreliable visual outputs, through radiologists and clinicians interpreting AI-enhanced medical images, triggers dependence on these images without means to distinguish hallucinated details, leading to misdiagnosis, inappropriate interventions, patient harm, and eroded trust.
